AI-powered SaaS platform; contributed to GTM strategy and converted 3 pilot customers into paying accounts

  • Drove architectural decisions across frontend and workflow orchestrations layer
  • Defined patterns for scalable state management and API integration across multiple product surfaces
  • Acted as a bridge between frontend, backend, and DevOps teams to ensure cohesive system design
  • Improved frontend performance through SSR/ISR optimization, code-splitting and caching strategies
  • Developed complex analytics dashboards using Recharts, enabling real-time visualization & insights

Accelerated product development and helped land a total of $50+ Million in funding in 2024

  • Provide mental health awareness campaigns and workshops to normalize therapy and wellness discussions
  • Shared success stories and testimonials to highlight the positive impact of mental health care
  • Utilized encryption, access controls, and regular audits to protect sensitive user data
  • Leverage ML to analyze user proles and preferences for accurate therapist-patient matching
  • Offer employers clear, data-driven reports showing the impact of mental health programs

Played a pivotal role in the product development

  • Used a professional and clean design, testimonials and case studies to build trust with healthcare providers
  • Helped dening an optical peer review process
  • Improved the application performance through query optimization, caching, and threading
  • Simplifying technical offerings for a diverse audience
  • Attended client meetings, collected user feedback, and laid out the action plans

Developed a website highlights its innovative use of technology to bridge gaps in healthcare delivery

  • Provided actionable insights focusing on integrating advanced analytics, AI, and healthcare workows
  • Developed features-tailored sections for healthcare providers, payers and patients
  • Used simple, jargon-free language, supported by visuals and infographics to demonstrate services benets
  • Highlighted HIPAA compliance, robust security measures, and testimonials to establish credibility
  • Mentored and supervised 2 junior engineers
